revision.comment: allow passing parameter for alt page to report
use {{ROOTPAGENAME}} as we don't want to include the /doc subpages when running the tool
Protected "[[Template:Template error report]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]; thousands of transclusions ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite))

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Template error report]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 4000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Per [[Special:Permalink/888965702#Template protected edit request on 22 March 2019|request]] by [[User:Bamyers99]]
addition of various options by [[User:DePiep]], see talk page for details
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Template error report#Requested move 13 March 2020 |Template talk:Template error report]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Template parameter usage|2=Template talk:Template error report#Requested move 13 March 2020 }}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{{label|}}}
 |={{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{lc}}}}}|no|S|s}}ee the [https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} monthly error report] for {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}]]|this template}}.
 |None|none=[https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} Monthly error report]
 |for|For=[https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} Monthly error report] for {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}]]|[[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}.
 |#default=[https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{{label|}}}]
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: change name to "parameter usage report" per discussion on talk

Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Template error report]] to [[Template:Template parameter usage]] without leaving a redirect: Requested by DePiep at [[WP:RM/TR]]: Misnomer, not an "error" report. Discussed [[Template_talk:Template_error_report#Improvements|here]] througout. Target not in use; pls move all subpages.
Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Template parameter usage]] to [[Template:Template error report]] without leaving a redirect

Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Template error report]] to [[Template:Template parameter usage]] without leaving a redirect: Requested by DePiep at [[WP:RM/TR]]: Misnomer, not an "error" report. Discussed [[Template_talk:Template_error_report#Improvements|here]] througout. Target not in use; pls move all subpages.
no need for upper case; "monthly" should not have been removed, since the reports are generated monthly.
Clearer text (should be advice rather than an order; not "the" report, a third-party, unofficial report; more introductory to unfamiliar users)
Added missing "lc" parameters; added optional "based" parameter to add text "based on this[/its] TemplateData" at end of template
clarify that the linked report applies only to article space
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
1 revision imported: importing the refn stuff to try to fix the Okinawa article
1 revision imported: trying to fix templates that I messed up
1 revision imported: reimporting to fix errors
1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
1 revision imported: importing categories I made
1 revision imported: importing blank templates I made to fill out template blank links
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:20:00 on [[Template:Template parameter usage]]
allow passing parameter for alt page to report
use {{ROOTPAGENAME}} as we don't want to include the /doc subpages when running the tool
Per [[Special:Permalink/888965702#Template protected edit request on 22 March 2019|request]] by [[User:Bamyers99]]
addition of various options by [[User:DePiep]], see talk page for details
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Template error report#Requested move 13 March 2020 |Template talk:Template error report]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{User:RMCD bot/subject notice|1=Template:Template parameter usage|2=Template talk:Template error report#Requested move 13 March 2020 }}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{{label|}}}
 |={{#ifeq:{{yesno-no|{{{lc}}}}}|no|S|s}}ee the [https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} monthly error report] for {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}]]|this template}}.
 |None|none=[https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} Monthly error report]
 |for|For=[https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} Monthly error report] for {{#if:{{{1|}}}|[[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}]]|[[Template:{{ROOTPAGENAME}}]]}}.
 |#default=[https://bambots.brucemyers.com/TemplateParam.php?wiki=enwiki&template={{Urlencode:{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME:{{{1|}}}}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{{label|}}}]
}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: change name to "parameter usage report" per discussion on talk

Anthony Appleyard moved page [[Template:Template error report]] to [[Template:Template parameter usage]] without leaving a redirect: Requested by DePiep at [[WP:RM/TR]]: Misnomer, not an "error" report. Discussed [[Template_talk:Template_error_report#Improvements|here]] througout. Target not in use; pls move all subpages.
no need for upper case; "monthly" should not have been removed, since the reports are generated monthly.
Clearer text (should be advice rather than an order; not "the" report, a third-party, unofficial report; more introductory to unfamiliar users)
Added missing "lc" parameters; added optional "based" parameter to add text "based on this[/its] TemplateData" at end of template
clarify that the linked report applies only to article space
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
never mind, that link doesn't even work
never mind, that link doesn't even work

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: overwriting coordinates so I hope they start working

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23034089081|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23034168414|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
1 revision imported: overwriting to try to fix the lower alpha issue
